# spacelift_slack_channel_integration (Data Source)

`spacelift_slack_channel_integration` represents a data source for retrieving information about an existing Slack channel integration in Spacelift.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "spacelift_slack_channel_integration" "prod_alerts" {
  integration_id = "some-integration-id"
}

output "integration_name" {
  value = data.spacelift_slack_channel_integration.prod_alerts.integration_name
}

output "slack_channel_id" {
  value = data.spacelift_slack_channel_integration.prod_alerts.slack_channel_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `integration_id` (String) ID of the Slack channel integration

### Read-Only

- `access_rule` (Set of Object) List of space access rules for the Slack channel integration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_rule))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `integration_name` (String) Human-readable name for the integration
- `slack_channel_id` (String) ID of the Slack channel

<a id="nestedatt--access_rule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_rule`

Read-Only:

- `role` (String)
- `space_id` (String)
